disclaimer: Curated from the published CMU CS BS curriculum. NOT an authoritative degree audit. Some rules (unit-based GenEd buckets, double-counting, minor/concentration) are simplified. Verify against Stellic and your academic advisor.

requirement_groups.name: Computer Science Core
requirement_groups.notes: All required. 15-122 requires 15-112 or a waiver.

requirement_groups.name: Artificial Intelligence Elective
requirement_groups.notes: One AI elective, min 9 units. 15-382 is Qatar-only.

requirement_groups.name: Domains Elective
requirement_groups.notes: One Domains elective, min 9 units. 02-251 may be satisfied by 02-180 & 02-181.

requirement_groups.name: Software Systems Elective
requirement_groups.notes: One Software Systems elective, min 12 units.

requirement_groups.name: School of Computer Science Electives
requirement_groups.constraint: Any SCS department (02/05/10/11/15/16/17), 200-level or above, 9+ units each. See exclusion list.
requirement_groups.notes: Two SCS electives. Open-ended pool, so expressed as a constraint rather than an enumerated list; excluded courses listed explicitly.

requirement_groups.name: Mathematics Core
requirement_groups.notes: 15-151 may be substituted by 21-127 or 21-128 if not offered.

requirement_groups.name: Probability choice
requirement_groups.notes: One probability course; OR the 36-225 & 36-226 two-course sequence.

requirement_groups.name: Science & Engineering
requirement_groups.constraint: 36 units from Mellon College of Science and/or College of Engineering.
requirement_groups.notes: Unit-based breadth; not enumerated. Curate approved list from GenEd page if needed.

requirement_groups.name: Humanities & Arts
requirement_groups.constraint: 63 units from Dietrich (H&SS) and/or College of Fine Arts; some Tepper courses qualify.
requirement_groups.notes: Unit-based breadth; any approved H&A course. Not enumerated for v1.

requirement_groups.name: Minor or Concentration / Free Electives
requirement_groups.constraint: A minor outside SCS, an SCS concentration, or an additional major/dual degree. Remainder as free electives.
requirement_groups.notes: Structural requirement; simplified to a unit target for v1.
